Text.Page:
A friend of mine died in battle a few days ago. It was tragic, but battle carries on, and so must we. I don't have the luxury of time to grieve.

Unfortunately, I also don't have time to go tell his wife of his passing, so she has not been able to grieve either.

I know it's a lot to ask, but would you please deliver the message to {@LinkCreature:62#1023$$Wynne} for me?

I see. And Tryphena couldn't bring me this news herself? How very respectful.

No matter. Thank you. Now...please go.
